jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Account Manager</strong></p><p>Cresta is the AI-contact-center platform pioneered around the conversational-intelligence-coaching data model & the AI agent-assist segment.</p>

jobs.title: Applied Data Scientist
jobs.content: <p>Build conversational-intelligence-coaching models for Cresta's real-time agent-assist surface.</p>

jobs.content: <p>Drive the Cresta Director supervisor-side workflow roadmap.</p>
